title: Delicately Roasted Kenyan Sweet Potatoes Roast
description: A tender and flavorful Kenyan dish featuring roasted sweet potatoes with ground nutmeg, perfect for a relaxing brunch
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, toss the sweet potatoes with olive oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and ground nutmeg until they are evenly coated
Spread the sweet potatoes out in a single layer on a baking sheet
Roast the sweet potatoes in the preheated oven for 20 minutes
After 20 minutes, remove the sweet potatoes from the oven and carefully pour in the water
Return the sweet potatoes to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes, or until they are tender
Remove the sweet potatoes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving
Serve the roasted sweet potatoes hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired
